0.q: Transgenic plants constitutively expressing AsHSP17 were significantly more sensitive to several abiotic stresses... The transgenic plant had reduced leaf chlorophyll content and decreased photosynthesis under both normal and stressed conditions compared with wild type.

1.q: auxin signalling was repressed through down‐regulation of miR393 targets, F‐box auxin receptors (... OsTIR1 and OsAFB2 in rice); we identified two targets of miR393a, AsAFB2 and AsTIR1

2.q: auxin signalling was repressed through down‐regulation of miR393 targets, F‐box auxin receptors; we identified two targets of miR393a, AsAFB2 and AsTIR1, whose expression is repressed in the transgenics

3.q: Heat stress strongly induced the expression of the AsHSP17 1000–2500-fold in leaves and >700-fold in roots.

4.q: AsHSP17 modulates expression of photosynthesis-related genes and regulates ABA biosynthesis, metabolism and ABA signalling as well as ABA-independent stress signalling

5.q: Several putative AsNFYA genes were experimentally verified to be the direct targets of miR169g.
